Common Questions

Framing FAQs

Find answers to production lead times, shipping details, print materials, and customization possibilities.

Every frame is handcrafted individually. Typically, standard framing takes 7 to 10 business days from the date of image selection. If rush ordering is requested, we can complete it in 3 to 4 days for an additional fee.

Yes, absolutely! While we primarily frame photographs taken during our portrait sessions, we are fully equipped to color-correct, print, and custom-frame any high-resolution digital photograph you provide.

We offer 4×4, 4×6, 5×7, 6×8, 8×10, 10×12, 10×15, 12×15, 12×18, 16×24, 20×30, plus A4 and A3. Need something else? Custom sizes are available on request.

Yes. We offer fully insured local delivery in Sri Lanka. For premium heavy frames, our team can coordinate standard wall-mounting installation instructions or perform setup upon delivery.

Yes, custom configuration is at the core of what we do. During our consultation, we will review various wood stain tones, double-mat setups, spacer choices, and floating mounts to match your room aesthetics.

Transform Your Walls

Turn Your Favorite Moments
Into Timeless Artwork

Our master framing team will craft the perfect custom layout for your physical display. Get in touch to schedule a design consultation today.
